title: AN ACT CREATING BARRIO AGLIPAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN MIGUEL, PROVINCE OF BOHOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 17375 / 65 OG No. 47, 13023 (November 24, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5583, June 21, 1969 ]

AN ACT CREATING BARRIO AGLIPAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN MIGUEL, PROVINCE OF BOHOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Sitio Aglipay in the Municipality of San Miguel, Province of Bohol, is hereby created and constituted into a barrio to be known as Barrio Aglipay.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1969.
